title: SearchRequest
description: A search request for CRM objects. Filter groups are combined with OR logic; filters within a group are combined with AND logic.

filterGroups.description: An array of filter groups. Records matching any filter group will be included in results (OR logic between groups). Filters within a group are all required (AND logic within groups).

items.description: A group of filter conditions combined with AND logic. Use multiple filter groups to create OR conditions between groups.

filters.description: An array of filters, all of which must match (AND logic).

sorts.description: An array of sort criteria to order the results.

items.description: A sort criterion for ordering search results.

propertyName.description: The name of the CRM property to sort by.

query.description: A full-text search query string. When provided, returns records where any searchable property contains the query term.

properties.description: An array of property names to include in the response for each record. If not specified, a default set of properties is returned.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return. Maximum value is 200.

after.description: The cursor token for pagination. Use the value from the previous response's paging.next.after to get the next page of results.
